query: INSERT INTO api_cache (source, lookup_key, response, response_kind, http_status, fetched_at, expires_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7) ON CONFLICT (source, lookup_key) DO UPDATE SET response      = EXCLUDED.response, response_kind = EXCLUDED.response_kind, http_status   = EXCLUDED.http_status, fetched_at    = EXCLUDED.fetched_at, expires_at    = EXCLUDED.expires_at
